hero.titulo: We're building the next generation of autonomous defense systems.
hero.subtitulo: AI Robotics is the technology innovation arm of Codeplex. We design, program and manufacture electronic products that don't yet exist on the market — or that exist without the capabilities reality needs.

mision.titulo: Bring artificial intelligence to the field where there were only passive cameras.
mision.descripcion: We work so that a business, a municipality or a private property stops being a spectator of its own security. Our AI detects threats, dispatches autonomous responses, and hands informed control to the human operator when it matters.

vision.titulo: A country where detecting a threat and responding in time doesn't depend on a guard watching every screen.
vision.descripcion: We imagine cities whose cameras stop recording crime and start preventing it, drones that reach the target before the police arrive, and turrets that defend private property in remote areas without permanent human staffing.

valores.descripcion: We seek systems that decide fast on the edge but hand control to humans when the decision carries serious consequences.
We build for the municipality, the warehouse and the storefront. We don't optimize for the lab.
We publicly document the progress of our prototypes. We show progress, not just the finished product.
Local design, programming and manufacturing. We respond fast because we're close.

historia.titulo: From a software team to an autonomous tech company.

hitos.descripcion: Codeplex consolidates as a custom software development house.
Codeplex launches AI Robotics as a division dedicated to new technologies and electronic devices.
We start the first weapon-detection and perimeter-fence tests.
We connect existing IP cameras to our detection engine and validate automated drone dispatch.
We start work on the response drone integrated with the AI surveillance system.

respaldo.descripcion: Codeplex is our parent company, dedicated to custom software development. AI Robotics was born from its R&D division to build the physical devices and computer-vision models that the next generation of security demands.

ctaCierre.titulo: Want to see what we're building right now?
ctaCierre.descripcion: Visit our newsroom for a public look at every prototype's progress.
